stimulus: In a study of humpback whales, biologist Aiyana Reyes and a team of researchers analyzed recordings of female humpback whales interacting with their calves.
stem: According to the table, in which year was the whale with the ID HW58 recorded with her calf?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. According to the table, whale HW58 was recorded with her calf in 2001.

Choice A is incorrect; 1995 is the recording year for HW34. Choice B is incorrect; 2007 is the recording year for HW11. Choice D is incorrect; 2016 is the recording year for HW82.
